profile.name: Your Name
profile.title: AI-Assisted Data & Location Intelligence
profile.headline: Bridging real-world data, operations, and emerging technology into practical digital workflows.
profile.summary: My work sits at the intersection of data quality, location intelligence, operational insight, and AI-assisted problem solving. I bring experience in POI analysis, routing issue investigation, geospatial data, field validation, and reporting—then translate those signals into clearer patterns, workflows, and opportunities for improvement.
profile.contactHeadline: Open to thoughtful opportunities across data, operations, product, and technology.
profile.contactText: I am interested in roles related to Data Analyst, Location Intelligence, Product/Data Operations, Technical Operations, AI-assisted workflow, and junior internal tools or web-adjacent development.

metrics.label: Years in data, GIS & operations
metrics.description: From geospatial database work to platform-level map data quality.

metrics.label: Strongest domain
metrics.description: Location data, routing issue analysis, and map quality validation.

metrics.label: Current growth path
metrics.description: GenAI, LLM, agents, RAG, Python, and AI-assisted workflow development.

roleFit.title: Data Analyst / Data Operations
roleFit.description: Comfortable working with operational data, issue patterns, reporting, classification logic, root-cause analysis, and cross-functional validation.

roleFit.title: Location Intelligence / GIS
roleFit.description: Experienced in POI validation, routing issues, spatial analysis, map data quality, geospatial workflows, and field reality.

roleFit.title: AI-Assisted Workflow
roleFit.description: Building toward practical tools and workflows with GenAI, LLMs, agents, RAG, Python, and spec-driven learning.

projects.title: PAC-MAN — POI Category & Business Type Detection
projects.description: Worked on an internal data quality initiative that explored how POI names can help indicate category and business type, while flagging potentially inconsistent attributes.
projects.tools: Classification Logic, POI Validation, Data Quality, Operational Data
projects.problem: Location data can be inconsistent: the POI name may suggest one category, while the stored category or business type may indicate another.
projects.approach: Applied classification logic and validation thinking to help detect possible category, business type, and attribute mismatches.
projects.evidence: Reflects my ability to connect messy operational data, rule-based thinking, and practical product/data quality needs.

projects.title: Audio Protect Dataset Support
projects.description: Supported feature development by preparing and categorizing sample abusive words for testing and validation.
projects.tools: Dataset Preparation, Language Pattern, Feature Testing, Safety Data
projects.problem: Safety-related features need structured sample data to test whether the system can recognize harmful or abusive speech patterns.
projects.approach: Prepared and categorized language samples to support feature validation and pattern recognition.
projects.evidence: Shows dataset preparation, taxonomy thinking, and careful support for product quality.

projects.title: AI-Assisted Workflow Learning Track
projects.description: Completed learning in GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, RAG, vibe coding, Python, machine learning fundamentals, deep learning fundamentals, and spec-driven development.
projects.tools: GenAI, LLM, Agents, RAG, Python, Spec-Driven Development
projects.problem: Moving from data operations into AI-assisted workflows requires structured learning and practice, not only tool familiarity.
projects.approach: Built foundational understanding across GenAI, LLM concepts, agents, RAG, Python, ML, deep learning, and spec-driven development.
projects.evidence: Shows a clear transition path toward practical AI-assisted tools, dashboards, validation workflows, and automation.

experience.bullets: Analyzed POI, routing, and map data quality issues across Indonesia.|Investigated driver-submitted reports to identify POI inaccuracies, incorrect attributes, map gaps, or routing logic issues.|Collaborated with Driver-Partners, Product, Engineering, Operations, and external map providers.|Prepared map accuracy and issue trend reports to support operational decision-making.|Participated in internal AI training covering GenAI, LLMs, agents, RAG, vibe coding, and practical AI use cases.

Supported national priority research on drought model development for sustainable food estate management.|Processed Landsat 8 imagery using ArcMap and supervised classification methods.|Prepared and organized spatial data from multiple research teams for server integration.|Supported technical setup for GIS workstations, servers, and research tools.

Processed flood data with HEC-GeoRAS and HEC-RAS.|Managed survey planning and data preparation for Grab Street View projects.|Cleaned location-based GoPro photo data using QGIS.|Used Python-based scripts to support photo migration and deliverable workflows.

Managed production and procurement of public health materials during COVID-19 response projects.|Coordinated production timeline, item specifications, vendor communication, and delivery preparation.|Handled projects involving cloth masks, handwashing campaign banners, and prevention kit materials.
Managed procurement and production of public health and community campaign materials.|Supported vendor coordination, production monitoring, and administrative documentation.
Digitized PJT II assets from drone-captured imagery.|Inputted and validated asset attributes based on field survey data.|Conducted field surveys to complete asset mapping data.

Supported geospatial database migration and services for BIG Network Node project.|Migrated attribute data from KUGI V3 to KUGI V4.|Organized available geospatial data and ran Python scripts to support migration workflows.
Assisted lecturers in Quantitative Methods, Cartography, and Statistics classes.|Inputted questionnaire data for an employee satisfaction survey project.|Digitized land cover data for Serang, Banten.

skills.items: Data cleaning, validation, root-cause analysis, classification logic, reporting, POI analysis, Google Sheets, Excel, Looker Studio
ArcGIS, QGIS, ENVI, spatial analysis, POI validation, routing issue analysis, geospatial database, field survey, remote sensing
GenAI fundamentals, LLM concepts, AI agents, RAG fundamentals, prompt-based development, spec-driven development
Basic Python, data processing scripts, file migration automation, beginner-level automation workflow, technical documentation
Windows maintenance, Ubuntu basics, workstation/server setup, system administration basics, hardware assembly
Cross-functional coordination, issue escalation, report writing, field validation notes, operational documentation

certifications.name: Belajar Dasar Cloud dan Gen AI di AWS
